summary: Verified ADR 0381 from the latest realistic mainline release context by replaying the Keycloak, shared-edge publication, and identity-core watchdog converge order on production, revalidating the ops/tasks login redirect contract end to end, and then rebasing the closeout onto the later reachable `origin/main` while repairing the remaining repository automation drift so the canonical status, receipt, certificate, and generated-doc validation paths all pass on merged main.

verification.check: Integrated repo automation and validation slice
verification.observed: The final integrated validation set passed on the rebased main closeout: the focused pytest surface returned `101 passed` from `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-12-ws-0381-mainline-pytest-r1.txt`; `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards generated-docs generated-portals` plus `git diff --check` passed from `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-12-ws-0381-mainline-repo-gates-r2.txt`; and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate` passed from `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-12-ws-0381-mainline-receipts-validate-r1.txt` after refreshing canonical truth, generated status docs, the dependency graph, the Excalidraw-derived diagrams, and the merge-to-main version metadata.

`make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-keycloak` and `make converge-keycloak env=production` both passed. The converge recap in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-12-ws-0381-main-converge-keycloak-0.178.126.txt` recorded `monitoring ok=20 changed=0 failed=0`, `nginx ok=49 changed=5 failed=0`, `postgres ok=79 changed=0 failed=0`, `proxmox-host ok=366 changed=0 failed=0`, and `runtime-control ok=262 changed=2 failed=0`.

verification.check: Exact-main public edge publication and certificate sweep
verification.observed: The first `make configure-edge-publication env=production` run stopped because the shared edge catalog still exposed `librechat.example.com` instead of the canonical `chat.example.com`. Aligning the service and subdomain catalogs cleared that shared input, the immediate rerun completed successfully in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-12-ws-0381-main-configure-edge-publication-r2-0.178.126.txt`, and the later dedicated certificate sweep in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-12-ws-0381-mainline-certificates-r1.txt` returned `46` valid domains with one unrelated `vault.example.com` reset against `100.64.0.1:443`.

`make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-identity-core-watchdog` and `make converge-identity-core-watchdog env=production` both passed, with `runtime-control ok=31 changed=0 failed=0` in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-12-ws-0381-main-converge-identity-core-watchdog-0.178.126.txt`.

`receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-12-ws-0381-main-auth-verification-r1.txt` shows `https://ops.example.com/` and `https://tasks.example.com/` returning `302` to `/oauth2/sign_in`, and both sign-in entrypoints returning `302` into the shared Keycloak authorize flow with `client_id=ops-portal-oauth`.

verification.check: Live watchdog and stale-session reset contract
verification.observed: The same auth-verification transcript confirms `lv3-ops-portal-oauth2-proxy-watchdog.timer` and `lv3-identity-watchdog.timer` active, `grep -c _lv3_ops_portal_proxy_csrf /etc/nginx/sites-available/lv3-edge.conf` returning `16`, `grep -c @oauth2_stale_session_reset ...` returning `32`, and `grep -c oauth2/sign_in\&client_id ...` returning `0` on the live edge host.

notes: The earlier branch receipt `2026-04-12-adr-0381-login-service-contracts-live-apply` remains the first-live proof from the isolated worktree; this mainline receipt is the canonical integrated evidence for merged repo version `0.178.127` while the verified live-applied platform remains on version `0.178.78`.

The exact-main auth replay was executed against `18dfb4ea01cd6c3787a61eaa5cceff7cfd496543`, the latest realistic mainline revision at apply time. During closeout, reachable `origin/main` advanced to `9afc6d691a9b99e40e8af1cdb2b61005ae8e266c`; the final merge was rebased onto that newer commit and limited to repo-validation, generated-document, and catalog-truth repairs without further ADR 0381 runtime changes.

The latest-main drifts cleared during integration were the missing compose macro loader, the raw Plane OIDC client update path that triggered a Keycloak HTTP 400, the shared-edge `librechat` versus `chat` catalog mismatch, certificate validation resolving `.local` from worktrees, the `control_plane_lanes.py` bootstrap needed by `generate_status_docs.py`, and a bounded ops-portal probe timeout in repo validation. Besides the unrelated `vault.example.com` reset, no ADR 0381 runtime regressions remained.
